title: Press Room | National Institutes of Health (NIH)
content: Press Room For the Press Submit a request for comment Image Sign up to receive our press releases Image Submit an interview request Image NIH-funded breakthrough shrinks CRISPR for precision delivery in the body April 13, 2026 | News Release Low-cost care model reduces blood pressure in high-risk populations April 8, 2026 | News Release NIH researchers discover pain-relieving drug with minimal addictive properties April 1, 2026 | News Release NIH awards top scientific teams for innovations linking nutrition and autoimmune disease March 30, 2026 | News Release Dr. Elisabeth Armstrong named NIH Chief of Staff March 30, 2026 | News Release Chronic inflammation leaves long-lasting impression on gut stem cells, increasing colorectal cancer risk March 25, 2026 | News Release NIH invests $150 million in human-based research to reduce use of animal models March 18, 2026 | News Release Clinical trial results support use of weekly extended-release buprenorphine for treatment of opioid use disorder during pregnancy March 16, 2026 | News Release Researchers develop AI tool to predict patients at risk of intimate partner violence March 13, 2026 | News Release Statement on the resignation of NIH Chief of Staff Seana Cranston March 10, 2026 | Statement This page last reviewed on August 6, 2025
